# @architecture/validate-frontend-conventions

Validates SPA feature conventions for the canonical UI baseline.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @architecture/validate-frontend-conventions
Version: 0.1.0
Component: validate-frontend-conventions
Type: tool
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: architecture
Bounded context: architecture-governance
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: stable
Role: tooling
Class: stable.tooling
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: on-change
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Fail the build when feature code renders the main#main-content landmark
- Fail the build on inline GraphQL operation strings in feature code
- Fail the build on raw /api/graphql fetch outside the approved browser client

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not validate import boundaries (validate-source-imports owns that)
- Does not validate i18n keys (validate-i18n owns that)

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```
